es.desc: Calcula log_b(x) = y ââ€ ” b^y = x. Ejemplo: logââ€šââ€šâ‚¬(1000) = 3. Calculadora gratuita y precisa, sin registro. Herramienta gratuita con formula y ejemplos.
es.seo_description: Calcula log_b(x) = y ââ€ ” b^y = x. Ejemplo: logââ€šââ€šâ‚¬(1000) = 3. Calculadora gratuita y precisa, sin registro. Herramienta gratuita con formula y ejemplos.
es.example_label: Calculate log base 10 of 1000 for pH or Richter scale calculations

range_hints.base_log: Common: 10 (common log), e≈2.718 (natural), 2 (binary); cannot be 0 or 1

es.result_context: The resultado ({resultado}) is the exponent to which base_log must be raised to get numero; log_natural uses base e (Euler's number).
es.formula_display: logᵦ(numero) = x where bˣ = numero | ln(numero) = logₑ(numero)
mistakes: Trying to calculate log of zero or negative numbers (undefined)
Using base 1 which is mathematically invalid for logarithms
Confusing log base 10 with natural log (base e)
